summary: Completed testing of centralized timezone architecture. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verification confirmed dashboard loads correctly with KPI cards, Anulaciones section, hourly sales chart, and date displayed in system timezone format. PUT /api/timezone with empty string edge case was fixed (was returning 500, now returns 400).

minor.issue: Empty string timezone validation was returning 500 instead of 400 - FIXED

context_for_next_testing_agent: Centralized timezone architecture tested and verified. Key components: (1) /api/timezone GET returns configured timezone from MongoDB system_config, (2) /api/timezone PUT updates timezone with validation and cache invalidation, (3) utils/timezone.py provides get_system_now(), get_local_today_utc_range(), utc_hour_to_local() functions, (4) Dashboard uses these utilities for all 'today' calculations, (5) Frontend uses lib/timezone.js with getSystemTimezone(), formatSystemDate() functions. Default timezone is America/Santo_Domingo (UTC-4).

backend_api.PUT /api/timezone with valid timezone up: PASS - Changed to America/New_York and restored
backend_api.PUT /api/timezone with invalid timezone: PASS - Tested Invalid/Timezone, FAKE_TZ, UTC+5, empty string, America/FakeCity

bug_fix_applied.issue: PUT /api/timezone returned 500 for empty string timezone
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added explicit empty string validation before ZoneInfo() call

backend.cache: In-memory cache in utils/timezone.py, invalidated on PUT
functions: get_system_now() - returns current datetime in configured timezone
get_local_today_utc_range() - returns UTC boundaries for local day
utc_hour_to_local(utc_hour) - converts UTC hour to local hour
formatSystemDate() - formats date in configured timezone
invalidateTimezoneCache() - clears cache after config update
